110-pants-and-chaps.title: Pants and Chaps
110-pants-and-chaps.desc: Whatever your riding style, Vanson has the pants or chaps for you. We offer a variety of styles made to complement our jackets. Made in the U.S.A. from quality leather, or textiles, available with or without armor you will find exactly what you need for a comfortable and safe motorbike riding experience.

111-traditional.title: Traditional
111-traditional.desc: Vanson's 50s and 60s style motorbike leather jackets bring back the classic days of Marlon Brando and Peter Fonda. So, whether you fancy yourself as a 'Wild One' or an 'Easy Rider' our Traditional Collection has the classic vintage motorcycle leather jacket for you.

114-sportrider.title: SportRider
114-sportrider.desc: Our Sport Rider collection is designed for riding sport bikes cut for those who ride in forward leaning position - trim, ergonomic, with direct lineage from the racetrack. A comfortable jacket with or without armor

122-casual-and-street.title: Casual and Street
122-casual-and-street.desc: Classic leather jackets by Vanson, the styling of these jackets is idea for casual and street use with some styles that replicate the racing jackets of the 60s and early 70s.

125-military-and-police.title: Military and Police
125-military-and-police.desc: Specifically designed for the Military and Law Enforcement these Vanson leather jackets have every feature that uniformed, and motor patrol officers require and can be tailored and customized to meet every Police departments requirement. Many have concealed carry (ccw) pockets. All of these models are available for civilian use.

127-mens-pants-and-chaps.title: Mens Pants and Chaps
127-mens-pants-and-chaps.desc: Whatever your riding style, Vanson has the pants or chaps for men. We offer a variety of styles made to complement our men's motorcycle jackets. Made in the U.S.A. from quality leather, or textiles, available with or without armor you will find exactly what you need for a comfortable and safe motorbike riding experience.

128-womens-pants-and-chaps.title: Womens Pants and Chaps
128-womens-pants-and-chaps.desc: Whatever your riding style, Vanson has the pants or chaps for women. We offer a variety of styles made to complement our women's motorcycle jackets. Made in the U.S.A. from quality leather, or textiles, available with or without armor you will find exactly what you need for a comfortable and safe motorbike riding experience.

129-mens-gloves.title: Mens Gloves
129-mens-gloves.desc: Vanson has been making Men's motorcycle specific gloves since 1975. Each style of glove has been designed to fit the needs of each type of riding style (Racing, Cruising, and Sport Riding). Each pair is hand made using the finest materials here in the U.S.

130-womens-gloves.title: Womens Gloves
130-womens-gloves.desc: Vanson has been making Women's motorcycle specific gloves since 1975. Each style of glove has been designed to fit the needs of each type of riding style (Racing, Cruising, and Sport Riding). Each pair is hand made using the finest materials here in the U.S.

133-mens-tees-and-sweats.title: Mens Tees and Sweats
133-mens-tees-and-sweats.desc: Finish off your attire with one of our timeless men's tees or sweatshirts. A cool way to show everyone you use the best when it comes to rider protection.

142-leather-garments.title: Leather Garments
142-leather-garments.desc: Our complete Leather Garment collection of jackets and pants designed for motorcycle riding. Our Designs are generational quality made to last for years. The jackets have style that defies the years, with some that were originally designed in 1974, and are still available today with a look that will compete with todays styles. We've got jackets out and about that people bought many years ago that are still being worn today. And, if they need repairs or modifications, don't worry, we have a repai

147-bag-collection.title: Bag Collection
147-bag-collection.desc: Travel in style, whatever your mode of transportation Vanson has the travel or tote bag for you. We have created a variety styles (leather and canvas construction), some complement our jackets while reflecting your personal style. So next time you are planning a trip cross country or just to the corner store make sure you travel with a Vanson.

155-textile-garments.title: Textile Garments
155-textile-garments.desc: Leather too heavy for you? Our Textile Garment collection features jackets designed using nylon or waxed cotton. Some of our styles are built with the motorcyclist in mind, others are designed for every day casual wear. Either way you'll look good when you wear them.

66-glove-collection.title: Glove Collection
66-glove-collection.desc: Vanson has been making motorcycle specific gloves since 1975. Each style of glove has been designed to fit the needs of each type of riding style (Racing, Cruising, and Sport Riding). Each pair is hand made using the finest materials here in the U.S.

695-traditional-mens.title: Traditional Mens
695-traditional-mens.desc: Vanson's 50s and 60s style men's motorbike leather jackets bring back the classic days of Marlon Brando and Peter Fonda. So, whether you fancy yourself as a 'Wild One' or an 'Easy Rider' our Men’s Traditional Collection has the classic vintage motorcycle leather jacket for you.

696-traditional-vests.title: Traditional Vests..
696-traditional-vests.desc: The 50s and 60s style leather and textile riding vests. Whether you fancy yourself as a 'Wild One' or an 'Easy Rider' our Traditional Vests have the style for you.

698-traditional-womens.title: Traditional Womens
698-traditional-womens.desc: The 50s and 60s style women's leather jackets bring back the days of Marlon Brando and Peter Fonda. So, whether you fancy yourself as a 'Wild One' or an 'Easy Rider' our Women's Traditional Collection has the look for you.

699-traditional-options.title: Traditional Options
699-traditional-options.desc: Vanson offers options such as suspenders, garment bags and cleaning products to keep your riding apparel fitting properly and looking like new.

703-sportrider-mens.title: SportRider Mens
703-sportrider-mens.desc: Our Men's Sport Rider collection is designed for riding sport bikes cut for those who ride in forward leaning position - trim, ergonomic, with direct lineage from the racetrack. A comfortable jacket with or without armor

704-sportrider-pants-and-gear.title: SportRider Pants and Gear
704-sportrider-pants-and-gear.desc: Vanson offers different style of riding pants and gear for those who want full protection when riding their motorcycle allowing them the option of taking the jacket off at rest stops. Our jacket and pants are patterned after our two piece racing suits. For those who do club racing we have designed into the pants the ability to attach knee pucks for further protection.

707-sportrider-womens.title: SportRider Womens
707-sportrider-womens.desc: Our Women’s Sport Rider collection is designed for riding sport bikes. The jackets are cut for the women who ride in forward leaning position. They are built on a basic chassis of the Vanson Sport Rider family of jackets - trim, ergonomic, and with direct lineage from the racetrack giving you a comfortable jacket and are available with or without armor.  Each handmade jacket is built to one simple standard: being the best there is, period.

710-sportrider-options.title: SportRider Options
710-sportrider-options.desc: Vanson Sport Rider options allows you to select the armor protection you want as well as, garment bags and cleaning products to keep your riding apparel fitting properly and looking like new.

72-motorcycle-road-racing-suits.title: Road Racing Suits
72-motorcycle-road-racing-suits.desc: Our Motorcycle Road Racing Suit is designed for maximum comfort and flexibility without sacrificing safety. We have different styles available with a list of options that allow you to customize your suit to perfectly fit your needs.

727-casual-and-street-mens.title: Casual and Street Mens
727-casual-and-street-mens.desc: Classic men's leather jackets, the styling of these jackets is idea for casual and street use with some styles that replicate the racing jackets of the 60s and early 70s.

73-tees-and-sweats.title: Tees and Sweats
73-tees-and-sweats.desc: Finish off your attire with one of our timeless tees or sweatshirts. A cool way to show everyone you use the best when it comes to rider protection.

731-mens-military-and-police.title: Mens Military and Police
731-mens-military-and-police.desc: Specifically designed for the Military and Law Enforcement these Vanson leather jackets have every feature that uniformed, and motor patrol officers require and can be tailored and customized to meet every Police departments requirement. Many have concealed carry (ccw) pockets. All of these models are available for civilian use.

733-military-and-police-options.title: Military and Police Options
733-military-and-police-options.desc: Vanson Military and Police Options offers garment bags, heavy duty hangers and cleaning products to keep your apparel fitting properly and looking like new.

737-pants-and-chaps-options.title: Pants and Chaps Options
737-pants-and-chaps-options.desc: Vanson's pants and Chaps Options offers suspenders and waistband extenders to keep your apparel fitting properly and looking like new.

74-bags-and-totes.title: Bags and Totes
74-bags-and-totes.desc: Travel in style, whatever your mode of transportation Vanson has the travel or tote bag for you. We have created a variety styles (leather and canvas construction), some complement our jackets while reflecting your personal style. So next time you are planning a trip cross country or just to the corner store make sure you travel with a Vanson.

742-off-the-rack-race-suit.title: Off the Rack Race-Suit
742-off-the-rack-race-suit.desc: Racing has been a passion for us from the beginning. All of our suits are built to the needs of racers. Over more than 44 years we have changed and modernized the way we build our racing suits. All of our custom suits are still built one at a time in the USA.

743-drag-race-suits.title: Drag Race Suits
743-drag-race-suits.desc: Our Leather Motorcycle Drag Racing suits are hand made in the USA. Designed for maximum comfort and flexibility without sacrificing safety allowing you to concentrate on making your fastest run possible. We have different styles available with a list of options that allow you to customize your suit to perfectly fit your needs.

746-automotive-suits.title: Automotive Suits
746-automotive-suits.desc: When you're wearing a Vanson race car fire suit you're benefiting from our over 44 years of motorcycle road-race suit development. We've engineered and constructed our suits for extreme functionality. We use CarbonX® a textile material which easily meets all current safety standards (SFI5 and SFI5) while being breathable and comfortable.

750-accessories-for-suits.title: Accessories for Suits
750-accessories-for-suits.desc: We offer a full range of accessories for your Vanson Racing Suit. From protection products to track accessories for you pit area.

752-womens-tees-and-sweats.title: Womens Tees and Sweats
752-womens-tees-and-sweats.desc: Finish off your attire with one of our timeless women's tees or sweatshirts. A cool way to show everyone you use the best when it comes to rider protection.

755-care-products.title: Care Products...
755-care-products.desc: Now that you have that fine Vanson Leather product you need the bling to go along with it. We offer a full range of care products to protect your Vanson investment as well as items that will show everyone that you protect yourself with the best riding apparel possible.

757-performance-and-armor.title: Performance and Armor...
757-performance-and-armor.desc: We offer a full range of performance product accessories to protect your Vanson investment as well as items that will show everyone that you protect yourself with the best riding apparel possible.

759-fun-stuff.title: Fun Stuff...
759-fun-stuff.desc: Now that you have that fine Vanson Leather product you need the bling to go along with it. We offer a full range of fun products to show everyone that you protect yourself with the best riding apparel possible.

763-armor-protection.title: Armor Protection
763-armor-protection.desc: Vanson offers a variety of armor options that you can choose from based on the protection level you want. We have three different levels of CE armor and three levels of GP armor. “CE” is an abbreviation of “Conformité Européene” a French phrase meaning “European Conformity”. The “CE Marking” is used in all EU official documents having to do with the European motorcycle safety standards. CE means that the armor has been tested to meet minimum safety requirements. CE Level 1 rated armor transfers

766-mens-leather.title: Mens Leather
766-mens-leather.desc: Our complete Men's Leather jackets are designed for motorcycle riding along with some casual wear designs. Our Designs are generational quality made to last for years. The jackets have styles that defies the years, with some that were originally designed in 1974, and are still available today with a look that will compete with today’s styles. We've got jackets out and about that people bought many years ago that are still being worn today. And, if they need repairs or modifications, don't worry,

768-vests-leather.title: Vests.. Leather
768-vests-leather.desc: The 50s and 60s style leather riding vests. Whether you fancy yourself as a 'Wild One' or an 'Easy Rider' our Leather Vests have the style for you.

769-womens-leather.title: Womens Leather
769-womens-leather.desc: Our complete Women's Leather Garment collection of jackets and pants designed for motorcycle riding. Our Designs are generational quality made to last for years. The jackets have style that defies the years, with some that were originally designed in 1974, and are still available today with a look that will compete with todays styles. We've got jackets out and about that people bought many years ago that are still being worn today. And, if they need repairs or modifications, don't worry, we have

771-mens-textile.title: Mens Textile
771-mens-textile.desc: Leather too heavy for you? Our Men's textile motorcycle jackets from our textile garment collection features jackets designed using nylon or waxed cotton. Some of our styles are built with the motorcyclist in mind, others are designed for every day casual wear. Either way you'll look good when you wear them.

773-womens-textile.title: Womens Textile
773-womens-textile.desc: Leather too heavy for you? Our Women's textile motorcycle jackets from our textile garment collection features jackets designed using nylon or waxed cotton. Some of our styles are built with the motorcyclist in mind, others are designed for every day casual wear. Either way you'll look good when you wear them.

778-armored-garments.title: Armored Garments
778-armored-garments.desc: Our Garments with Armor collection are jackets designed specifically for motorcycle riding. Choose from a variety of styles cut for different types of riding positions, all come with CE approved armor at the shoulder and elbows

779-mens-armored.title: Mens Armored
779-mens-armored.desc: Our men's Garments with Armor collection are jackets designed specifically for motorcycle riding. Choose from a variety of styles cut for different types of riding positions, all come with CE approved armor at the shoulder and elbows

781-womens-armored.title: Womens Armored
781-womens-armored.desc: Our Women's Garments with Armor collection are jackets designed specifically for motorcycle riding. Choose from a variety of styles cut for different types of riding positions, all come with CE approved armor at the shoulder and elbows

783-air-flow-garments.title: Air-Flow Garments
783-air-flow-garments.desc: Our Full Air-Flow Garment collection are jackets designed for warm weather riding. Some are designed using our Pro-Perf vented leather others using vented textile nylon Cordura for maximum air-flow. Either way you will rider cool and protected all season long.

784-mens-air-flow.title: Mens Air-Flow
784-mens-air-flow.desc: Our Men's Full Air-Flow Garment collection are jackets designed for warm weather riding. Some are designed using our Pro-Perf vented leather others using vented textile nylon Cordura for maximum air-flow. Either way you will rider cool and protected all season long.

786-womens-air-flow.title: Womens Air-Flow
786-womens-air-flow.desc: Our Women's Full Air-Flow Garment collection are jackets designed for warm weather riding. Some are designed using our Pro-Perf vented leather others using vented textile nylon Cordura for maximum air-flow. Either way you will rider cool and protected all season long.

788-controllable-vents.title: Controllable Vents
788-controllable-vents.desc: Our Vent System Garment collection are jackets designed for three season riding. Designed using our AirCurtain RamAir ventilation. Choose from a variety of Leather or textile jackets. When riding in warm to cool weather take advantage of the AirCurtain system by opening the zipper vents to achieve the desired effect. Too cold for the vents? Just zip the vents shut. Still too cold, some of the jackets are designed to accept our MK3 Streamliner a Wind resistant and reversible insulated universal l

789-mens-vented.title: Mens Vented
789-mens-vented.desc: Vanson's Men's Vented motorcycle jackets are designed for three season riding. Designed using our AirCurtain RamAir ventilation. Choose from a variety of Leather or textile jackets. When riding in warm to cool weather take advantage of the AirCurtain system by opening the zipper vents to achieve the desired effect. Too cold for the vents? Our jackets are designed to accept our MK3 Streamliner a Wind resistant and reversible insulated universal liner.

791-womens-vented.title: Womens Vented
791-womens-vented.desc: Our Women's Vent System jackets are designed for three season riding. Designed using our AirCurtain RamAir ventilation. Choose from a variety of Leather or textile jackets. When riding in warm to cool weather take advantage of the AirCurtain system by opening the zipper vents to achieve the desired effect. Too cold for the vents? Just zip the vents shut. Still too cold, some of the jackets are designed to accept our MK3 Streamliner a Wind resistant and reversible insulated universal liner.

823-limited-and-new.title: Limited and New
823-limited-and-new.desc: Limited and New. This section will be changing all the time. From time to time, we will be offering items from our past that haven’t been available for a while. These items will have a sales shelf life so make sure to visit here often. In addition, our new items will be displayed in this section allowing you to view all that is new easily.

824-limited-and-new-mens.title: Limited and New Mens
824-limited-and-new-mens.desc: Explore our newest releases and limited-run pieces crafted for riders who demand both performance and exclusivity. Each item carries Vanson’s racing-tested legacy and American craftsmanship, built with rugged leather, protective armor options, and precision fit. These are small-batch creations — engineered for those who value timeless style and reliability on the road or track. Don’t wait — once they’re gone, they’re gone.

826-limited-and-new-womens.title: Limited and New Womens
826-limited-and-new-womens.desc: Discover the latest small-batch releases designed for women riders who value both style and performance. Each piece combines Vanson’s heritage of handcrafted quality with functional design, from precision fit to protective armor options. These limited-run creations are built to endure the ride while standing out with a timeless edge. Browse now — these exclusive designs won’t last long.

827-adventure-touring.title: Adventure Touring
827-adventure-touring.desc: Our kindred spirit of adventure along with our embedded motorcycle street and racing DNA has enabled Vanson to create a series of jackets for the Adventure touring riders. The looser fitting wax cotton designs along with the nylon models give the adventure (dual sport) rider the added flexibility necessary when navigating offroad trails while still offering the armor protection needed for the occasional oops.  Baggers and Sport Tourers will find these jackets to be a nice addition to their ridin

878-armor-ready.title: Armor-Ready
878-armor-ready.desc: Our Armor Compatible collection are jackets designed for riding or casual every day wear. They are designed to accept armor. Let's say you bough one to wear casually and a year or two down the road decided to get a motorcycle, these jackets are built to accept armor, just order the correct armor and install it yourself, now your ready to ride.

879-mens-armor-ready.title: Mens Armor-Ready
879-mens-armor-ready.desc: Our Men's Garments with Armor collection are jackets designed specifically for motorcycle riding. Choose from a variety of styles cut for different types of riding positions, all come with CE approved armor at the shoulder and elbows.

884-limited-bag-collection.title: Bag Collection
884-limited-bag-collection.desc: Built for the road and designed with the same uncompromising standards as our legendary leathers, the Vanson Bag Collection blends utility, durability, and attitude. Each piece is crafted in small batches from premium materials—engineered to age well, carry hard, and look better every mile. Whether you’re hauling gear, tools, or the essentials, these limited-release bags deliver rugged function with a clean, iconic Vanson edge.

94-accessories.title: Accessories
94-accessories.desc: Now that you have that fine Vanson Leather product you need the bling to go along with it. We offer a full range of care products to protect your Vanson investment as well as items that will show everyone that you protect yourself with the best riding apparel possible.
